nasb.text: And immediately an angel of the Lord struck him because he did not give God the glory, and he was eaten by worms and died.

esv.text: Immediately an angel of the Lord struck him down, because he did not give God the glory, and he was eaten by worms and breathed his last.

cnv.text: 他不歸榮耀給　神，所以主的使者立刻擊打他，他被蟲咬，就斷了氣。

ccb.text: 希律没有把荣耀归给上帝，主的天使立刻惩罚他，他当场被虫子咬死了。

csbs.text: 主的一位天使立刻击打希律，因为他没有把荣耀归给神。他被虫咬蚀，就断了气。
